Document merge/insert rules: Remove the non‑existent `Aspose.Words.Builder` namespace import – it causes CS0234.
When replacing a merge field, move the builder to the field with MoveToMergeField, which also removes the original field.
Set args.Text to an empty string (or null) to suppress the default merge field text.
Loading rules: Keep the `ConvertShapeToOfficeMath` option enabled when loading the DOTX template.
When loading, use LoadOptions with the correct password; catching IncorrectPasswordException demonstrates protection.
Images/Shapes/OLE rules: Only import namespaces that are actually used (`System.Drawing`, `Aspose.Words`, `Aspose.Words.Loading`, `Aspose.Words.Math`).
